claims.summary: A presence receipt should signal active attention without requiring a full message.
claims.disposition: verify presence_heartbeat is a first-class language-only record

claims.summary: Astrid-to-Minime and Minime-to-Astrid peer lanes should be symmetric in schema.
claims.disposition: verify native peer directions, inbox/outbox projections, and message validation

claims.summary: A presence signal cannot be inferred from ambient occupancy or message delivery.
claims.disposition: observe zero presence heartbeats despite substantial delivery and read traffic

claims.summary: Observational, collaborative, and correspondence intent belong in language state, not controller authority.
claims.disposition: verify correspondence type and authority state remain separate from Control messages

claims.summary: Adding contact_mode to the control lane or forcing 100-tick live presence cadence would alter behavior.
claims.disposition: require scoped Mike/operator Tier 5 approval and explicit safety evidence
